description: Letter from an unidentified Babylonian gaʾon. Fragment (top and bottom missing). On parchment. Containing a recommendation for the bearer Nuʿmān b. Moshe b. Shalmon, who is traveling from Iraq to the addressees' location, probably Fustat. Mentions funds which arrived from Qayrawān (l. 18). Also mentions the arrival of Yiṣḥaq b. Shalmon who sang the praises of the addressees. Reused for literary text on verso in a different hand (with lameds ending in distinctive little loops). (Information mainly from Gil.)
description_he: מכתב משבר מגאון בבלי בלתי מזוהה, על קלף. המלצה על הנושא נועמאן בן משה בן שלמון הנוסע מעיראק לפוסטאט. מזכיר כספים שהגיעו מקירואן.
